results.rendered_html:
eka—veṇi or eka—veṇī, f. a single braid of hair (worn by women, as a sign of mourning, when their husbands are dead or absent for a long period),  Śak. ;  R. ;  Megh. ;
a woman wearing her hair in the above manner.
